de.uka.ilkd.key.macros

Class FinishSymbolicExecutionWithSpecJoinsMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.FilterStrategy
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.macros.FinishSymbolicExecutionWithSpecJoinsMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Named, Feature, Strategy
    Enclosing class:
    FinishSymbolicExecutionWithSpecJoinsMacro

    private class FinishSymbolicExecutionWithSpecJoinsMacro.FilterSymbexStrategy
extends FilterStrategy
    The Class FilterSymbexStrategy is a special strategy assigning to any rule infinite costs if the goal has no modality or if a join point is reached.

      • FilterSymbexStrategy

        public FilterSymbexStrategy(Strategy delegate)
        Creates a new FilterSymbexStrategy based on the given delegate.

        delegate - The strategy to wrap.

    • Method Detail

      • getAndResetJoinInformation

        public Pair<Goal,JoinRuleBuiltInRuleApp> getAndResetJoinInformation()
        Returns the information for a join to apply if applicable, or null if there is no join to execute. Every call reset the join information, such that the strategy can continue.
        Returns:
        The information for a join to apply if applicable, or null if there is no join to execute.

      • name

        public Name name()
        Description copied from interface: Named
        returns the name of this element
        Returns:
        the name of the element

      • isApprovedApp

        public boolean isApprovedApp(RuleApp app,
                             PosInOccurrence pio,
                             Goal goal)
        Description copied from interface: Strategy
        Re-Evaluate a RuleApp. This method is called immediately before a rule is really applied
        Specified by:
        isApprovedApp in interface Strategy
        Overrides:
        isApprovedApp in class FilterStrategy
        Returns:
        true iff the rule should be applied, false otherwise

      • isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal

        public boolean isStopAtFirstNonCloseableGoal()
        Description copied from interface: Strategy
        Checks if the Strategy should stop at the first non closeable Goal.
        Returns:
        true stop, false continue on other Goals.

      • getPioForBreakpoint

        private PosInOccurrence getPioForBreakpoint(Statement breakpoint,
                                            Sequent sequent)
        Returns the PosInOccurrence for the given breakpoint statement inside the given sequent, or null if the statement does not exist within the sequent. The returned PosInOccurrence is the top level formula inside the sequent containing the breakpoint statement.
        Parameters:
        breakpoint - The statement to locate inside the sequent.
        sequent - The sequent to find the statement in.
        Returns:
        The top level formula inside the sequent containing the breakpoint statement.

      • findJoinPoints

        private HashSet<ProgramElement> findJoinPoints(StatementBlock toSearch,
                                               Goal goal)
        Returns a set of join points for the given statement block. Join points are directly registered once they are found.
        Parameters:
        toSearch - The statement block to search for join points.
        goal - The goal corresponding to the statement block.
        Returns:
        A set of join points for the given statement block.

      • getBlockContractFor

        private Pair<BlockContract,Statement> getBlockContractFor(Statement stmt,
                                                          Services services)
        Obtains the pair of block contract containing a join specification and the corresponding breakpoint, if any, for the given statement. If there is no such contract, null is returned.
        Parameters:
        stmt - Statement to find a contract and breakpoint for. This should be the whole "program counter", i.e. the next statement that will be the breakpoint should also be included.
        services - The services object.
        Returns:
        If any, a join block contract and corresponding break point for the given statement; null otherwise.

      • getBreakPoint

        private Statement getBreakPoint(Semisequent succedent,
                                Services services)
        Parameters:
        succedent - Succedent of a sequent.
        Returns:
        A Statement (the registered breakpoint) iff the given succedent has one formula starting with a break point statement, else null;

      • hasBreakPoint

        private boolean hasBreakPoint(Semisequent succedent,
                              Services services,
                              Statement breakpoint)
        Parameters:
        succedent - Succedent of a sequent.
        Returns:
        True iff the given succedent has one formula with a break point statement, else null;

      • hasStmtForWhichPredicateHolds

        private boolean hasStmtForWhichPredicateHolds(Semisequent succedent,
                                              Services services,
                                              FinishSymbolicExecutionWithSpecJoinsMacro.Predicate<Statement> pred)
        Parameters:
        succedent - Succedent of a sequent.
        pred - A decision predicate.
        Returns:
        True iff the given succedent has one formula for which pred holds.
